description: Characters involved in combat, defense, and military service.
characters: Knight
An armored warrior bound by oath and honor.
Squire
A young trainee serving a knight and learning the ways of chivalry.
Ranger
A woodland protector who patrols the wild borders.
Archer
A keen-eyed marksman who strikes from a distance.
Warrior
A battle-hardened fighter who lives by the sword.
Scout
A quick and quiet observer who ventures ahead of the group.
Mercenary
A sword-for-hire who fights for coin, not cause.
Admiral
A commander of fleets who rules the waves.
Castellan
A guardian of the castle who keeps its walls secure.
Falconer
A trained handler who hunts with birds of prey.
